review_notes: Layer: light_overlays. Deterministic v003 replaces the v002 projector cone with three disconnected local responses: a one-pixel housing rim, a shallow wall bounce ending above the character plane, and a 34 by 8 pixel table-B crescent left of Lev's x475 seat anchor. No global dim, connecting beam, dither, blur, text, or geometry changes. Palette check and twelve integrated Phase 2 screenshots pass at both canonical viewports on 2026-07-18. Keep in review_queue pending the human promotion checkpoint.
